default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between HighTouch and GrowthX for AI-powered content creation and adaptation.](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HighTouch is interested in GrowthX's AI content services, particularly for programmatic pages and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Current bandwidth constraints on HighTouch's side necessitate revisiting the project in mid-October](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [GrowthX demonstrated innovative adaptation techniques, including character-based content styling](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Potential future use cases include video script generation and case study automation](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality and Adaptation

  - [Initial content from GrowthX lacks HighTouch's specific tone and point of view](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [GrowthX showcased innovative adaptation techniques using character-based styling (e.g., Tony Stark voice)](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Adaptation process involves extracting key elements from well-written sentences to anchor the desired brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)

### HighTouch's Content Needs

  - [Less technical, more marketing-focused content (e.g., "how this company does marketing")](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Interest in programmatic pages, particularly for loyalty programs (100+ pages)](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Potential for video script generation and case study automation in the future](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### Project Timeline and Next Steps

  - [HighTouch's current focus: case study development and organic video content](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Limited bandwidth until mid-October due to ongoing projects and company onsite](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Scheduled follow-up meeting for October 17th at 12 PM Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

### GrowthX's Process and Clientele

  - [Rapid deal cycles (2-day to 2-week) with mostly inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Primary clients are founders/CEOs introduced through VC or word-of-mouth](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Growing demand leading to careful management of new engagements](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send examples of programmatic content and technical adaptations to Luke](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Luke to keep GrowthX updated on any public content outputs from HighTouch](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Reconvene on October 17th to discuss project specifics and potential start date](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [HighTouch to prioritize programmatic pages over blog posts for initial collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/4n1PxoL7Qq67-hrnnk5XL5sCy72FW26s?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

action_items.description: Send calendar invite for follow up call week of October 15th
Share examples of other companies using fwd.digital's services
Send Luke examples of HeyGen content fwd.digital has created
